periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 70. Southeast wind around 1 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 7am, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 87, with temperatures falling to around 84 in the afternoon. West southwest wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.
